summary: Decent (source unknown) recording of a short but lively show, highlighted by acoustic banter and strong renditions of Let It Grow, He's Gone and Not Fade Away.
review: The reviewer enjoys the brevity of this set, noting several “great spots,” especially the relaxed banter during the acoustic portion. Standout moments include energetic takes on “Let It Grow,” “He's Gone” and a spirited “Not Fade Away.” No specific recording‑quality comments are offered, but the 4‑star rating suggests an overall good listening experience.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review, but it is positive (4 stars) and highlights strong musical moments; lack of technical detail lowers confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit comments on sound clarity or mix; rating inferred from overall positive review.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Shorter than the following night’s show but contains several high points, especially relaxed acoustic banter and tight song performances.
